palma_port_adriano.route_note: Coastal transit between Palma and Port Adriano.

palma_porto_cervo.name: Palma -> Porto Cervo

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit lane

palma_porto_cervo.route_note: Coastal transit between Palma and Porto Cervo.

palma_porto_cristo.name: Palma -> Porto Cristo

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit lane

palma_porto_cristo.route_note: Coastal transit between Palma and Porto Cristo.

palma_porto_portals.name: Palma -> Puerto Portals

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit lane

palma_porto_portals.route_note: Coastal transit between Palma and Puerto Portals.

palma_san_antonio.name: Sant Antoni -> Palma

validation.suitability: representative for Ibiza Channel wave exposure

palma_san_antonio.route_note: Crossing between Southwest Mallorca and Sant Antoni de Portmany in Northwest Ibiza; exposed to full West/Northwest wave fetches.

palma_soller.name: Soller -> Palma

validation.suitability: closest public SOCIB wave buoy to Palma departure waters

palma_soller.route_note: Scenic coastal transit along the rugged Serra de Tramuntana (Northwest Mallorca); watch for strong wind funneling and high northwest swell.

palma_st_tropez.name: Palma -> Saint-Tropez

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

palma_st_tropez.route_note: Long crossing from the French Riviera to the Balearics; watch for Mistral and Tramontane wind accelerations in the Gulf of Lion.

palma_tarragona.name: Tarragona -> Palma

validation.suitability: forecast-only mainland transit lane until a trusted validation source is added

palma_tarragona.route_note: Mainland transit crossing between Palma and Tarragona; open sea conditions with frequent North/Northwest wind acceleration off the Ebro delta.

palma_theoule_sur_mer.name: Palma -> Théoule-sur-Mer

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

palma_theoule_sur_mer.route_note: Riviera to Balearics open crossing; watch for significant wave heights when crossing the Gulf of Lion.

palma_toulon.name: Toulon -> Palma

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

palma_toulon.route_note: North-to-South crossing from Toulon to Palma; fully exposed to the Gulf of Lion and Balearic Sea swell.

palma_valencia.name: Palma -> Valencia

validation.suitability: forecast-only mainland transit lane until a trusted validation source is added

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

palma_valencia.route_note: Mainland transit lane to Valencia; forecast coverage is available, while validation will be added later when a trusted observation source is chosen. Until the data domain is widened further west, the far-west end of the lane is only approximate.

porto_vecchio_portofino.name: Portofino -> Porto Vecchio

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit lane until a trusted validation source is added

porto_vecchio_portofino.route_note: Transit lane from Portofino to Porto Vecchio.

st_tropez_theoule_sur_mer.name: Théoule-sur-Mer -> Saint-Tropez

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

st_tropez_theoule_sur_mer.route_note: Short and beautiful Esterel crossing; watch for red rock bay thermal winds.

st_tropez_toulon.name: Saint-Tropez -> Toulon

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

st_tropez_toulon.route_note: Shorter coastal run around Cape Camarat; comfort depends on easterly swell.

tarragona_valencia.name: Tarragona -> Valencia

validation.suitability: Forecast-only mainland transit lane

tarragona_valencia.route_note: Tarragona to Valencia mainland coastal transit; useful for long planning windows and route comparison.

theoule_sur_mer_toulon.name: Théoule-sur-Mer -> Toulon

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

theoule_sur_mer_toulon.route_note: Var to Alpes-Maritimes transit around Cape Camarat and the Esterel; relatively sheltered but subject to swell variations.
